title: ChapterMeta
description: Per-chapter lifecycle tracking — replaces review-status.json. Stored at books/<id>/story/state/chapter-meta.json. Every pipeline mutation path (write, draft, review, rewrite, undo) must update this file.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for future migration support.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent modification to this file.

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapter records. Sorted by chapter number ascending.

status.description: Current lifecycle status. See Status Lifecycle section in novel-write.md for transition rules.

wordCount.description: Word count (en) or character count (zh) of the chapter content.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the chapter record was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the chapter record was last modified.

auditIssues.description: Counts of audit issues from the most recent audit run.

lengthWarnings.description: Warnings from the inline length check (empty if within target band).

lengthTelemetry.description: Length check telemetry from the most recent write or revision.

tokenUsage.description: Cumulative token usage across all pipeline stages for this chapter.

reviewerNotes.description: Human-written notes from manual review (e.g. 'dialogue feels stilted in scene 2').

approvedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the chapter was approved (set by --approve).

revisionCount.description: Number of revision rounds applied to this chapter.

AuditIssues.description: Issue counts from the most recent audit run.

LengthTelemetry.description: Length check telemetry from the inline length check.

target.description: Target word/character count from book.json chapterWordCount.

actual.description: Actual word/character count of the chapter.

adjustment.description: Result of the inline length check: none (within band), expanded (self-expanded), compressed (self-compressed), failed (beyond recovery band).

TokenUsage.description: Cumulative token usage for this chapter across pipeline stages.
